gui.title: VRC auto fish 263302
gui.tip_shake: Shake head via OSC before casting to prevent getting stuck
gui.tip_jump:
Send /input/Jump via OSC before casting to prevent getting stuck
No window focus needed
gui.tip_shake_time: Shake head duration per segment (s), 0 = no shake
gui.tip_skip_success:
When enabled, skips success threshold check.
Always clicks twice to reel in regardless of success/fail.
Useful if getting stuck at success detection.
gui.log_debug_hint: [Hint] Debug screenshots saved to debug/, detector will output confidence
gui.log_path_error: [Error] Path contains non-ASCII characters, may cause image/model load failure!
gui.log_path_hint: Please move to an ASCII-only path, e.g.: D:\fish
gui.log_yolo_collect_on: [YOLO] Data collection enabled — screenshots will be saved during fishing
gui.log_yolo_device: [YOLO] Device changed: {label} — takes effect on next start
gui.log_screenshot_region: Window region: x={x} y={y} w={w} h={h}
gui.log_screenshot_no_window: [Error] Cannot screenshot: VRChat window not connected
gui.log_roi_cancel: [ROI] Cancelled (area too small or ESC pressed)
gui.log_roi_prompt: [ROI] Draw a rectangle in the popup, Enter=OK / Esc=Cancel
gui.log_skip_on: [Setting] Skip success check: On (always click twice)

BITE_FORCE_HOOK: Wait N seconds without bite then force hook
FISH_GAME_SIZE: Approx fish icon size in pixels; smaller = higher search scale
HOLD_MIN_S: Smaller = faster descent; larger = more float
HOLD_GAIN: Position error x gain = extra hold duration
PREDICT_AHEAD: Time ahead to predict future position
SPEED_DAMPING: Fast drop = more hold; fast rise = less hold
MAX_FISH_BAR_DIST: Bar distance beyond this is treated as false detection
TRACK_MIN_ANGLE: Enable rotation when track tilt exceeds this angle
TRACK_MAX_ANGLE: Above this angle treated as false detection (e.g. horizon)
REGION_UP: Pixels to search upward after white bar lock
REGION_DOWN: Pixels to search downward after white bar lock
REGION_X: Search N pixels left/right of white bar center
POST_CATCH_DELAY: Wait N seconds after catch/fail before next cast
VERIFY_CONSECUTIVE: Consecutive frames required to confirm mini-game start
SUCCESS_PROGRESS: Progress bar above this % = fishing success

log.yolo_load_warn: [YOLO] Load failed: {e}, falling back to template matching
log.cast_record: [🎣 Cast] Recording mode — cast manually (click mouse)
log.cast_jump: [🎣 Cast] Casting → jump to prevent jam
log.cast_shake: [🎣 Cast] Casting → shake head to prevent jam
log.hook_record: [🪝 Hook] Recording mode — hook manually (click mouse)
log.confirmed: [✓ Confirmed] UI detected! ({elapsed:.1f}s, {frames} frames) Auto ROI: X={rx} Y={ry} {rw}x{rh}
log.false_trigger: [✗ False Trigger] UI not confirmed within {frames} frames (hits: {hit}/{req}), recasting
log.window_not_found: Window containing "{keyword}" not found (script itself excluded)
log.whitelist_skip: [Whitelist] {name} not in whitelist, skipping this catch
